ModifyInstanceProperties.action: Action to perform on the instance. Current value: modifyAttribute.
ModifyInstanceProperties.name: Instance name. Supports uppercase and lowercase letters, digits, and special characters `-_ /.`. Must start with a letter. Length: 1–65 characters.
ModifyInstanceProperties.netEthQueueCount: Number of NIC queues after modification
ModifyInstanceProperties.enableJumboFrame: Whether to enable Jumbo Frame. Enable: true, Disable: false. Note: Only instance types that support Jumbo Frame can enable this feature.
